name: Twisted Wolf
notes: Original Twisted design with no classic-game counterpart; completes the Twisted line alongside Freddy, Bonnie and Foxy.

name: Fetch
notes: Robotic dog from Freddy Fazbear's Pizza that 'fetches' whatever its paired phone suggests its owner needs — with escalating horror.
One of Fazbear Frights' most iconic creations; also inspired a Special Delivery animatronic — verify before adding fnaf-ar.

name: The Stitchwraith
notes: Endoskeleton in a hooded coat, protagonist of the Stitchwraith Stingers — the epilogue storyline threading through the entire Fazbear Frights series.
Appearances list debut and finale only; the epilogues span most volumes in between — map fully during a dedicated Frights sweep.

name: Eleanor
notes: Fazbear Frights' overarching villain: a shapeshifting agony entity resembling Circus Baby, introduced in 'To Be Beautiful'.
Deliberately not linked to circus-baby via counterparts — the resemblance is in-universe mystery, not the same character.
Verify the exact volumes of her appearances during a dedicated Frights sweep.
